occurrence_sentence: Meet [QuantFi](https://www.quantfi.com/), a startup intent on ' _creating quantum computer algorithms for the financial services industry'.
The two-person founder team of CEO Paul Hiriart and his partner Kevin Callaghan have years of experience in banking, as well as structured and quantitative finance between them.

occurrence_sentence: QuantFi joins the likes of CryptoNext, NextGenQ, Pasqal, Quandela, and VeriQloud in the French QC landscape.

QuantFi joins the likes of [CryptoNext](https://cryptonext-security.com/), [NextGenQ](https://thequantuminsider.com/2019/12/16/parlez-vous-nextgenq/), [Pasqal](https://pasqal.io/about/), [Quandela](https://thequantuminsider.com/2019/12/06/french-startup-quandela-lights-up-the-qc-world/), and [VeriQloud](https://veriqloud.com/) in the French QC landscape.
James Dargan is a writer and researcher at The Quantum Insider.
